content:
Got it — quick brief to lock the prototype.

<question-form id="discovery" title="Quick brief — 30 seconds">
{
  "description": "I'll lock these in before building. Skip what doesn't apply — I'll fill defaults.",
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": "pageType",
      "label": "What kind of prototype is this?",
      "type": "radio",
      "required": true,
      "options": [
        "Landing / marketing page",
        "Product dashboard / app UI",
        "Docs / knowledge hub",
        "Pricing / plans",
        "Other — I'll describe"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "platform",
      "label": "Target platform",
      "type": "checkbox",
      "maxSelections": 3,
      "options": [
        "Responsive web",
        "Desktop web",
        "iOS app",
        "Android app",
        "Tablet app",
        "Desktop app",
        "Fixed canvas (1920×1080)"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "scale",
      "label": "Roughly how much?",
      "type": "text",
      "placeholder": "e.g. 1 page with 6 sections, 3 screens, 1 dashboard + 2 detail views"
    },
    {
      "id": "keyContent",
      "label": "Key content or sections to include",
      "type": "textarea",
      "placeholder": "e.g. hero headline, 3 features, metrics, integrations, testimonials, CTA"
    },
    {
      "id": "constraints",
      "label": "Anything else I should know?",
      "type": "textarea",
      "placeholder": "Real copy, required elements, things to avoid, deadline…"
    }
  ]
}
</question-form>
